positive: A symmetrical, central composition of stylized mystical forest elements: giant glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, intertwined swirling vines, and abstract celestial moons and stars. The scene must feature strong, clean silhouettes with high contrast, echoing Art Nouveau and geometric tattoo aesthetics. Use a palette dominated by deep midnight blues, emerald greens, and vibrant cosmic purples, highlighted by neon cyan accents. The design should be highly graphic and scalable for a large apparel print, with perfect symmetry and negative space suitable for printing on fabric.
